{{CargoRelic
|name=Top Adventurer Badge
|class_id=20470
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The badge customized for the adventurer association. It is issued to those who passed a series of tests or the elite members that accomplished great achievements. It is the highest honor for an adventurer!
|fame=30
|art=15
|fth=14
|civ=18
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 500 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +2<br>Fissure Floor: 15000/15000
|ss2=Per 500 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +4<br>Fissure Floor: 15000/15000
|ss3=Per 500 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +6<br>Fissure Floor: 15000/15000
|ss4=Per 500 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +6<br>Fissure Floor: 15000/15000
|ss7=Per 500 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +6<br>Fissure Floor: 15000/15000<br> (Awakened)
}}
